creator: info@hobury.com
text:
A boot-only of a 7.2 beta (announced 10 apr 2009) enters sysinstall as
normal, but cannot connect to the ftp mirrors: leads to timeout. Possibly
same issue for non-amd64 machines. A boot-only reinstall on same machines
of 7.1 version works fine. Tried several mirrors from the ftp-list.

How-To-Repeat: Boot-only 64-bits 7.2 beta: sysinstall
